title: Embedded List Pattern — NXGN Actions Web
purpose: **AI Summary**: An embedded list manages child rows on a parent entity being edited. It renders inside a capture page using `nxgn-grid-page-title` + `nxgn-data-grid`, with checkbox multi-select and toolbar buttons for Add, Edit, and Delete. The component receives its data array via `model.required<T[]>()` for two-way binding, configuration flags via `input()`, and emits domain commands via `output()` — the parent owns the API calls. Local mutations (add, delete) update the model in place; the...

examples.name: Data Flow Example 1
examples.code:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Parent Capture Page                                    │
│                                                         │
│  CaptureState.collection ◄──── loadEntity() populates   │
│         │                                               │
│         │  [(collection)]="state.collection"            │
│         ▼                                               │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────┐                │
│  │  Embedded List Component            │                │
│  │                                     │                │
│  │  model.required<DTO[]>()  ◄─────── two-way bind     │
│  │  input(false)             ◄─────── config flags     │
│  │  output<DTO>()            ────────► domain commands  │
│  │                                     │                │
│  │  Add ──► child route navigation     │                │
│  │  Delete ──► model.update(filter)    │                │
│  │  Double-click ──► child route nav   │                │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────┘                │
│                                                         │
│  onSave() ──► map temp IDs → EMPTY_GUID ──► API call   │
│  onDomainCommand($event) ──► featureService.method()    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

examples.code:
// ✓ CORRECT — translate pipe for template strings
template: `
  <nxgn-grid-page-title
    [title]="'actions.evidence.title' | translate"
    ...
  />
`

// ✗ WRONG — hardcoded strings in templates

  <nxgn-grid-page-title
    title="Evidences"
    ...
  />
`

sections.title: Prerequisites
content: Install before implementing — see [Overview — Required Packages](overview.md#required-packages):
| `@ngx-translate/core` | All user-facing strings (`translate` pipe in templates, `TranslateService` in code) |

sections.title: Data Flow
content: │  onSave() ──► map temp IDs → EMPTY_GUID ──► API call   │

sections.title: Component Structure
content: Every embedded list component follows this skeleton. The canonical example is `ActionEvidenceListComponent`.
import { ChangeDetectionStrategy, Component, computed, inject, input, model, output, signal } from '@angular/core';
import { type ColDef, type RowDoubleClickedEvent } from 'ag-grid-community';
<!-- Domain command buttons go in the custom-buttons slot -->
/** Two-way bound child array from parent capture component */
/** Whether to show domain command actions (only in edit mode with saved records) */
// --- Domain command outputs (parent handles the API call) ---
// --- Local mutations (modify model in place, saved with parent) ---
All classification fields on child DTOs MUST use `EnumDTO` ([ADR-0005](../../adr/0005-enumdto-nameddto-for-ui-binding.md)):
// ✗ WRONG — bare string for classification fields
// ✗ WRONG — union types require transformation for dropdown binding
evidenceType: EvidenceType;   // ← can't bind directly to dropdown
See [Feature Service — Model Rules](feature-service.md) for full DTO conventions.
The simplest form has no `output()` events and no custom buttons. This is the right shape for embedded lists that only support local CRUD (add/edit/delete saved with the parent).

Some embedded lists only support deletion. Steps on an workflow cannot be "added" through the embedded list — they are managed via a separate provisioning flow. Double-click navigates to a different feature (Users), not a child capture route.
// Double-click navigates to a different feature (Users), not a child route

sections.title: Usage in Parent Capture Page
content: Embedded lists sit inside card sections of the parent template. Two patterns exist:
**Edit-mode only** (steps on an workflow — only meaningful for saved records):
The parent capture page is responsible for:
2. **Mapping temp IDs** on save — new children have `crypto.randomUUID()` IDs that must become `EMPTY_GUID` before the API call
3. **Handling domain commands** by calling the [Feature Service](feature-service.md) and reloading
4. **Tracking server IDs** to distinguish new vs existing children
// Aggregate children — delegated to state so child routes can access them
/** Track IDs loaded from the server to distinguish new vs existing items */
// On load: populate state and record server IDs
// On save: map temp UUIDs back to EMPTY_GUID for new items
// Domain command handler: call API, reload entity
await this.loadAction(this.action()!.id);  // Reload to reflect server state
Embedded lists that support Add/Edit navigate to child routes — never modals. The parent uses `<router-outlet>` with visibility toggling:
The child capture page injects `CaptureState` to read/write the same collection:
See [Capture State](capture-state.md) for the full child route data flow.

sections.title: Key Rules
content: | `model.required<T[]>()` | Two-way data binding with parent | Always — the child collection |
| `output<T>()` | Domain commands the parent executes | Server-side operations (mark reviewed, approve/reject) |
- **MUST** use inline `template:` (not `templateUrl:`) — keeps the component self-contained
- **MUST** bind `[selectedItems]` to `nxgn-grid-page-title` — controls toolbar button state
- **MUST** import `TranslatePipe` and use the `translate` pipe for all user-facing strings
- **SHOULD** use `custom-buttons` content projection slot for domain command buttons
- **MUST NOT** use `templateUrl:` pointing to a separate HTML file
// ✓ CORRECT — translate pipe for template strings
Column header translation will use `TranslateService` with `await firstValueFrom()` once translation keys are established, matching Capstone's async column header pattern:
// Acceptable for now — hardcoded column headers (translate when i18n keys exist)
- **Local mutations** (add, delete, reorder): call `model.update(list => ...)` — changes are saved with the parent aggregate
- **Domain commands** (mark reviewed, approve/reject): emit via `output()` — parent calls the API and reloads
- **Never call the API directly** from an embedded list component — the parent owns the service
// ✓ CORRECT — local delete mutation with confirmation
// ✗ WRONG — calling API directly from embedded list
await this.evidenceService.delete(selectedIds);  // ← parent owns the API
- **Add/Edit** navigates to a child route when the embedded list has its own capture form: `this.router.navigate(['segment', id], { relativeTo: this.route })`
- **Never use modals** for add/edit — always child routes when a capture form is needed
- **Not all embedded lists have Add/Edit** — some only support Delete (e.g., `WorkflowStepListComponent` has Remove but no Add; double-click navigates to the User detail page instead)
- **Cross-feature double-click** (e.g., step → user detail) navigates to an absolute route
// ✓ CORRECT — child route navigation for Add
- New children get `crypto.randomUUID()` as a temp client-side ID
- Parent tracks `serverIds = new Set(loaded.map(x => x.id))` after load
// ✓ CORRECT — parent save maps temp IDs
// ✗ WRONG — sending temp UUIDs to the backend
const evidence = this.evidence();  // ← temp UUIDs will confuse the backend
- All classification fields use `EnumDTO`, not bare `string` or union types ([ADR-0005](../../adr/0005-enumdto-nameddto-for-ui-binding.md))
- Child DTOs colocate with the parent: `ActionEvidenceDTO` in `action.models.ts`
- One DTO per entity — no duplicates like `MemberDTO` and `WorkflowStepDTO`
- All DTOs are `interface` with `{ get; set; }` properties — not `type` aliases or `class`

sections.title: Notification Rules
content: | Domain command success/error | `ToastrService` (in parent) | "Evidence status updated" / "Failed to update evidence" |
| Domain command confirmation | `ConfirmationDialogService.confirm()` | Translated via `actions.evidence.approveConfirm` / `actions.evidence.rejectConfirm` keys |
| Validation errors | Not applicable — embedded lists have no form fields | — |
All notification messages MUST go through `@ngx-translate/core` for i18n support.

sections.title: Departures from Capstone
content: | Data binding | `@Input() model` (mutable model class), `@ViewChild` for grid access | `model.required<T[]>()` (signal two-way binding) | [ADR-0006](../../adr/0006-signal-based-state-over-behaviorsubject.md) — signals over imperative state |
| DI style | Constructor injection | `inject()` function | Modern Angular standalone component convention |
| Change detection | Default (implicit) | `OnPush` (explicit) | Signal-based state enables OnPush everywhere |
| Templates | Separate `templateUrl` HTML files | Inline `template:` string | Embedded lists are small; inline keeps them self-contained |

| Add/Edit flow | Modal dialogs (`NgbModal`) | Child routes (`router.navigate`) | [ADR-0015](../../adr/0015-child-routes-over-modals-for-entity-capture.md) — child routes for list→capture navigation |

| Grid component | `NxgnGridComponent` (custom wrapper with `@ViewChild` imperative API) | `DataGridComponent` from `@nxgn-solutions/ui` (declarative input binding) | Shared UI library provides declarative grid |
| Grid title | `EntityGridLegendTitleComponent` | `GridPageTitleComponent` from `@nxgn-solutions/ui` | Shared UI library equivalent |
| Confirmation | `window.confirm()` with translated string | `ConfirmationDialogService.confirmDelete()` | Styled modal dialog consistent with app design |
| Selection tracking | `this.gridComponent.getSelectedNodes()` via `@ViewChild` | `(selectionChanged)` event → `signal<{ id: string }[]>` | Declarative signal flow avoids imperative grid access |
| Classification fields | String constants and raw strings | `EnumDTO` structured types | [ADR-0005](../../adr/0005-enumdto-nameddto-for-ui-binding.md) — zero-transformation dropdown roundtrip |

sections.title: See Also
content: - [Capture Page](capture-page.md) — The parent page that hosts embedded lists; covers save lifecycle, ID mapping, and domain command handling
- [Capture State](capture-state.md) — State service that holds child data across child-route navigation
- [Feature Service](feature-service.md) — HTTP service the parent calls for domain commands
- [Validation](validation.md) — Confirmation dialog patterns used by embedded lists; duplicate detection for child capture routes
- [ADR-0004](../../adr/0004-enum-over-string-constants-for-status-fields.md) — Enum over string constants (backend C# enums)
